mapper.insert: INSERT INTO view_history (user_id, product_id, viewed_price, viewed_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{viewedPrice}, #{viewedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM view_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY viewed_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM view_history WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM view_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT vh.product_id, p.name AS product_name, p.main_image AS product_image, p.price AS current_price, COUNT(*) AS view_count FROM view_history vh INNER JOIN product p ON vh.product_id = p.id WHERE vh.viewed_at >= #{startTime} GROUP BY vh.product_id, p.name, p.main_image, p.price ORDER BY view_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
